text: A fusiform wide local excision was performed, axially based along an existing deep cutaneous fur- row, and margins were harvested for frozen speci- men. A unipolar needle tip electrocautery device, set on 20 W for both cut and coagulation modes, was being used for hemostasis. During use of the electro- cautery, a flame appeared that seemed to be originat- ing from beneath the drapes. All drapes and the nasal cannula were immediately removed from the patient, and the flame was noted to be emanating from the nasal cannula. The oxygen delivery was stopped and the flame subsequently abated.
